title: Lifedrinker

markdown:
# Lifedrinker

Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage (your choice) to the creature, and you can expend one of your [[hit_point_dice Point Dice]] to roll it and regain a number of [[hit_points Points]] equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1 [[hit_points Point]]).
